# `license_entitlement` stanza

@include 'alerts/enterprise-only.mdx'

<Note title="Required when using an IBM Passport Advantage Online license">

  You must configure the `license_entitlement` to start up a Vault Enterprise
  server with an IBM Passport Advantage Online license. You do not need an entitlement stanza for
  HashiCorp licenses.

</Note>

The `license_entitlement` stanza provides the entitlement details associated with
your IBM Passport Advantage Online license for your Vault server.

Vault fails to start and logs an error that it could not find a valid license if
the configured parameters do not match the entitlements detailed in your IBM Passport Advantage Online
license.

If the configured parameters match multiple entitlements in the license, Vault
uses the entitlement with the termination date farthest in the future.

<CodeBlockConfig hideClipboard>

```hcl
# IBM Vault Self-Managed Essentials (D1015ZX)
license_entitlement {
  edition = "essentials"
}

# IBM Vault Self-Managed Standard (D101FZX)
license_entitlement {
  edition = "standard"
}

# IBM Vault Self-Managed Premium (D101AZX)
license_entitlement {
  edition = "premium"
}

# IBM Vault Self-Managed PKI Certificate Add-On Install (D1406ZX)
license_entitlement {
  edition = "premium"
  add_ons = "pki-only"
}

# IBM Vault Self Managed Platform Standard Install (D15FQZX)
license_entitlement {
  edition = "platform-standard"
}

# IBM Vault Self Managed Platform Standard including KMIP Install (D155LZX)
license_entitlement {
  edition = "platform-standard"
  add_ons = "kmip"
}
```

</CodeBlockConfig>

<Note>

Passport Advantage Online keys do not yet support the Advanced Data Protection (ADP) add-ons. If you want to enable a Vault Enterprise cluster for ADP Key Management or ADP Transform, you must continue to use a HashiCorp license key.

</Note>

## `license_entitlement` parameters

- `edition` `(string: <required>)` - The Vault Enterprise edition specified in
  your IBM Passport Advantage Online license entitlement.
- `add_ons` `(string: "")` - A comma-separated list of additional features/modules
  specified in your IBM Passport Advantage Online license entitlement for Vault.
